content: Flutter Material 3 bottom sheet implementation using showModalBottomSheet() with showDragHandle: true for drag handle, enableDrag: true for swipe-to-close. Use whenComplete callback to handle both swipe-down and programmatic close. For camera lifecycle, call _controller.stop() at sheet open and _controller.start() in whenComplete. Use StatefulBuilder or ValueNotifier for sheet state. Material 3 supports isScrollControlled for taller sheets.
